name: UnitedHealth Group
headline: UnitedHealth Group ROTATION CONFIRMATION at 11.4 / Critical (working baseline applied May 14). No new material evidence dated May 14-15. Carry-forward: DOJ probe ongoing (Medicare billing, Optum Rx physician reimbursement); Senate Grassley investigation 50,000-page review with finding of 'aggressive gaming of Medicare Advantage'; Congressman Ryan demanding DOJ maintain investigation despite staff reductions; Optum Rx transparent pricing model (May 13) remains the only proactive reform signal. Per scanner skip note: do NOT re-propose 10.9 → 11.4 (applied May 14). Confirmation cycle; no score change.
